title: Resolve, to Direct State Agencies to Implement the Social Security Fairness Act
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 13, 2025
last_house_action: 4/24/2025 - Committee on Labor suggested and ordered printed. The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/13/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
